title: Compression
description: Perintah untuk mengompres dan mengekstrak file di macOS.

commands.name: tar
commands.title: Tar Archive
commands.examples:
tar -czf archive.tar.gz folder/
tar -xzf archive.tar.gz
tar -xzf archive.tar.gz -C ~/extract/
tar -tvf archive.tar.gz

commands.name: zip
commands.title: Zip
commands.examples:
zip -r project.zip project/
zip -re secure.zip sensitive/
zip -r backup.zip . -x '*.git*' -x 'node_modules/*'

commands.name: unzip
commands.title: Unzip
commands.examples:
unzip file.zip
unzip file.zip -d ~/extracted/
unzip -l file.zip

commands.name: gzip
commands.title: Gzip
commands.examples:
gzip file.txt
gzip -k large.log
gzip -d file.txt.gz
gzip -l file.txt.gz

commands.name: hdiutil
commands.title: Disk Image (macOS)
commands.description: Membuat dan mengelola disk image (.dmg) di macOS.
commands.examples:
hdiutil create -size 100m -volname "MyDisk" -fs HFS+ mydisk.dmg
hdiutil attach installer.dmg
hdiutil detach /Volumes/MyDisk
hdiutil convert input.dmg -format UDZO -o compressed.dmg
commands.notes: Fitur khas macOS untuk mengelola file .dmg.
